title: Chart view to track the movement of your items through groups on your board
excerpt: I need to be able to see how many of my files flow from stage one to two to three and drop out or get closed. I haven’t found any way to track this and would love to see this feature. It’s imperative to my sales business…

posts.author: rachelviso (Rachel Endresen)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to be able to see how many of my files flow from stage one to two to three and drop out or get closed. I haven’t found any way to track this and would love to see this feature. It’s imperative to my sales business and growth.

posts.author: gbanse (Gregg Banse)
posts.cookedHtml: I concur. I’m trying to figure out how to do this through automations.
